name: opsboard-workflow
description: Plan and supervise Git-native OPSBOARD software delivery.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, execute, review, and evidence Git-native software delivery.
interface.longDescription: Initialize the Git and git-bug contract, plan approval-gated sprints, work in isolated worktrees, record factual status, capture review evidence, and register a read-only OPSBOARD dashboard source.
defaultPrompt: Initialize this repository for the Git-native OPSBOARD workflow.
Turn this brief into an approval-gated OPSBOARD sprint proposal.
Prepare an approved OPSBOARD issue in an isolated external worktree.
